title: cyathea notabilis
intro: Cyathea notabilis, also known as the Black Tree Fern, is a species of tree fern native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cyathea notabilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant's fiddlehead fronds are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
